values.Description:
What happens when you give an LLM the opportunity to draw? This is an experiment that builds upon this idea. The project got quite the reception and was featured on [India's got Intelligence](https://indiasgotintelligence.com/IGI-Stories/Post/3188/A-simple-experiment-with-Langchain-student-built-AI-That-Draws-Exactly-What-You-Say).

The Project itself is built using [Langchain](https://www.langchain.com), [Langgraph](https://www.langchain.com/langgraph) and [Openrouter](https://openrouter.ai/) in Python.
values.Title: Draw AI

values.Description: The project is an interesting experiment, written in Go (Ephemeral Backend) and Vue (frontend) it works using GitHub repositories as a storage medium that can be served using GitHub pages. This is the CMS that powers the content on this site as well.
values.Tagline: A headless CMS that uses GitHub repositories as the backend storage.
values.Title: VachanCMS

values.Description:
Brand Furnitures is a sample landing page I built in under a day. The landing page consists of a very modern minimalist style. The luxurious feel of the furniture brand is brought out by a barrage of slow but thoughtful animations.

The [motion](https://motion.dev/) (formerly known as framer-motion) library enables the smooth animations. The styles are enabled by the use of TailwindCSS. The single page site is coded up using React.
values.Tagline: A modern, simple, elegant, responsive landing page for a furnitures business
values.Title: Brand Furnitute

values.Description:
## The Problem

In today’s digital age, users are constantly inundated with an overwhelming amount of content spanning across multiple devices and platforms. Managing and organizing these files, videos, links, and other digital assets can be cumbersome and inefficient. Users often find themselves juggling between different storage solutions, leading to fragmented data and wasted time searching for important information. The lack of a unified system to save and access content seamlessly across various devices poses a significant challenge for productivity and organization.OneStore: One Spot for All Your Saves


OneStore addresses this problem by providing a Free and Open Source Software (FOSS) that unifies the process of saving and accessing digital content. With OneStore, you can effortlessly save files, videos, links, and other shareable items from any device, anywhere, anytime into a single, centralised vault.The mobile apps ensure that content can be saved instantly and accessed conveniently from anywhere, anytime. The intuitive dashboard website offers a centralized hub for managing all saved content, with advanced search, categorization, and tagging features to enhance organization and retrieval.OneStore’s seamless integration across devices, user-friendly interface, and commitment to privacy and security make it a comprehensive solution for today’s digital content management needs.All Code can be found in the monorepo at: https://github.com/Open-One-Store/OneStore

## Tech Stack

1.  Backend API: ExpressJS, NodeJS, Prisma, Minio Object Storage, PostgreSQL
2. Web Dashboard: React JS, TailwindCSS, react-router-dom, Tanstack Query, vite
3. Mobile App: Flutter, Dart

## Use cases


OneStore caters to a diverse range of users, each benefiting uniquely from its capabilities. Students and educators can use OneStore to save and organize study materials, research articles, and educational videos, ensuring they have access to crucial resources across devices. Professionals can save work documents, project files, and important links, streamlining their workflow and enhancing productivity by having all necessary content in one place. Content creators can efficiently store and manage creative assets such as photos, videos, and design files, and easily jot down ideas as they come, knowing they can access and expand on them later from any device. For general users, OneStore simplifies digital life by providing a single location for personal files, travel itineraries, recipes, and more, ensuring all important information is easily accessible and well-organized.
values.Tagline: One Spot for All Your Saves
values.Title: OneStore

values.Description:
A novel attempt to use LLMs to interact with VSCode using voice inputs. This project was built in 3 days in November 2024, before we had widespread Tool Calling support in models or MCP protocols. It also implements a custom XML parsing and processing strategy for structured output, before LLMs were widely able to output JSON reliably.

This project was showcased and recognized at the  [Rakuten Technology Conference 2024](https://corp.rakuten.co.in/rakuten-technology-conference-2024/)  conducted in Bangalore India.

Read more on how the project works on the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/vachanmn123/v2c)
values.Title: Voice 2 Code

values.Description: A Custom Whitelisting plugin using MongoDB developed specifically for TrixMC Minecraft Network’s flagship SMP – Derpitcraft. The plugin was used in a deployment with over 500+ active players and is still in active deployment.
values.Tagline: A Bukkit Plugin for managing whitelists
values.Title: Bukkit Whitelist Plugin

values.Description:
Edulink was a freelance project I worked on, it is a way for any institution to manage their strategic partnerships with various organizations.

It is built using NextJS, MongoDB and Clerk Authentication.

The application was completed within a timeline of about 10 days.
values.Title: EduLink

values.Description:
ILB-Careers was a project I built for one of my clients as a freelancer, it allows organizations to list jobs and for applicants to apply to these jobs.

The Project has 2 parts:

1. The Backend is written in Python using Flask and Flask-RESTful, MongoDB and JWT for authentication
2. The frontend is written with NextJS, TailwindCSS, and the TailwindUI kit.
values.Tagline: A Job Application Portal for organizations
values.Technologies: Python, Flask, MongoDB, Javascript, NextJS, TailwindCSS, TailwindUI
values.Title: ILB-Careers

values.Description: A custom implementation of teams plugins specifically made for the TrixMC Minecraft Network’s flagship SMP – Derpitcraft. The Plugin was used by over 500+ users and is in active deployment at TrixMC even today!
values.Tagline: A plugin to manage teams on Minecraft Servers
values.Title: Bukkit Teams Plugin

values.Description:
FDA Publishes a large public API dataset with information about various reactions that have been reported for many drugs. The dataset consists of a very large number of entries and this project was a learning attempt to learn more about how to efficiently display and manage large amounts of data on the web.

The project was built using NextJS
values.Tagline: A data viewing interface for the FDA Drug Reports API
values.Title: FDA Drug Reports
